free_text: -STATISTICAL ANALYSIS OF FAST NEUTRON TOTAL CROSS-
SECTIONS OF SILICON, PHOSPHOR, SULFUR, AND CHLORINE-
2 MV VAN DE GRAAFF ACCELERATOR.
D(D,N)HE-3, DEUTERIUM GAS TARGET (3 CM
THICK, 5.0 CM-HG, ENTRANCE WINDOW OF NI-FOIL
OF 0.00005 INCHES).
.GOOD GEOMETRY TRANSMISSION MEASUREMENT
WITH A DC-BEAM OF MONOENERGETIC NEUTRONS.
ANTHRACENE CRYSTAL SCINTILLATION COUNTER
(2 CM DIAM. , 2.5 CM HIGH) WITH PULSE-SHAPE
DISCRIMINATION TO BLOCK GAMMA-RAYS.
37.5 CM FROM THE CENTER OF THE GAS CELL TO THE SAMPLE
37.5 CM FROM THE SAMPLE TO THE DETECTOR.
.LEVEL SPACINGS AND STRENGTH FUNCTIONS CALCULATED FROM
TOTAL CROSS SECTIONS FLUCTUATIONS.
.THE 3.75 MEV RESONANCE IN THE NEUTRON TOTAL CROSS-
SECTIONS OF OXYGEN WAS USED AS STANDARD OF THE NEUTRON
ENERGY, BNL-325 (1958).
A.P.T. JAPAN CODE CHANGED TO JPN
.IN-SCATTERING CORRECTION.
.ENERGY SPREAD(FWHM) OF 50 KEV AT 3.2 MEV AND 20 KEV
AT 5.1 MEV.
.SILICON IN POWDER FORM (PURITY 99.9 PERC.)
FILLED IN A LUCITE CYLINDER (3.7 CM INNER
DIAM. AND 9.0 CM LONG).
.DATA FROM PRIVATE COMMUNICATION.
.STATISTICAL ERRORS OF THE CROSS SECTIONS ARE LESS
THAN 2 PERCENT, OVERALL ERRORS INCLUDING ERRORS IN
DIMENSIONS OF THE SAMPLE ARE ESTIMATED TO BE LESS
THAN 3 PERC.
